name: Oral FMT capsules aging and frailty trial
summary: Recruiting randomized early phase 1 trial of oral FMT capsules versus placebo in adults aged 70 to 85 years, with week-96 reduction in frailty score as the primary outcome.

trial_details.expected_results_window: The registry record lists Dec. 31, 2027 as the study end date and had no posted results as of Jun. 3, 2026.
trial_details.horizon_note: Not a near-term result, but the frailty endpoint is more reader-legible than many biomarker-only studies.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Week-96 frailty outcomes could provide functional evidence for microbiome ecosystem replacement in older adults.
